---
title: Microelectronic Circuit Design
author:
  - name: Daniel Albinger
    Matrikelnummer: 5183249
    corresponding: true
    email: dalbinger@stud.hs-bremen.de
    roles: []
    affiliations:
      - Curvenote
  - name: Charlotte Beckert
    Matrikelnummer: 5
    corresponding: true
    email: cbeckert@stud.hs-bremen.de
    roles: []
    affiliations:
      - Curvenote
  - name: Nils Renner
    Matrikelnummer: 5
    corresponding: true
    email: nrenner@stud.hs-bremen.de
    roles: []
    affiliations:
      - Curvenote
keywords:
  - Microelectronic Circuit Design
abstract: |
  Microelectronic Circuit Design
plain-language-summary: |
  Microelectronic Circuit Design
key-points:
  - Microelectronic Circuit Design
date: last-modified
bibliography: references.bib
citation:
  container-title: Microelectronic Circuit Design
number-sections: true
jupyter: python3
---

## Introduction 

## Conclusion

## References {.unnumbered}
